strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..and so he left, having blown up the moon for no discernible reason.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_UTILITY_SHOTGUN_DESCRIPTI: Вистріліть з <style=cIsUtility>дробовика</style>, завдаючи <style=cIsDamage>14x140% шкоди</style>, і відштовхніться віддачею.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_TYPHOONUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVE: As Nemesis Henry, beat the game or obliterate on Typhoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HENRY_MASTERYACHIEVEMENT: Як Генрі, пройдіть гру або знищіть на Monsoon.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SCEPBAZOOKA_DESCR:
Зарядіть і випустіть ракету на <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% шкоди</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: тримайте дві Bazookas одночасно.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_DODGESLASH_DESCRI: Backflip, slashing nearby enemies for <style=cIsDamage>300% damage</style>. <style=cIsUtility>You cannot be hit during the flip.</style>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_BLINKCSS_DESCRIPT:
<style=cIsHealing>5% Energy.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Instantly blink</style> to a nearby enemy.
<style=cIsHealing>10% Energy.</style> Discharge a burst of <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> for <style=cIsDamage>400% damage</style>, <style=cIsUtility>launching yourself with the recoil</style>.
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Mr. Green<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Sword is a good all-rounder while Boxing Gloves are better for laying a beatdown on more powerful foes.

< ! > Pistol is a powerful anti air, with its low cooldown and high damage.

< ! > Roll has a lingering armor buff that helps to use it aggressively.

< ! > Bomb can be used to wipe crowds with ease.</color>
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_UTILITY_DASH_DESCRIPTIO: Ривок на коротку дистанцію. При контакті з <style=cIsUtility>клоном</style> стрибніть угору й нанесіть потужний <style=cIsUtility>удар ліктем</style> на <style=cIsDamage>800% шкоди</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPBAZOOKA_DESCR:
Зарядіть і випустіть ракети на <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% шкоди</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: тримайте дві Bazookas одночасно.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_TORRENT_DESCRIP: <style=cIsHealing>5% Energy.</style> Fire a barrage of <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> shots. Hold to continue firing, consuming more <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> per shot.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Nemesis Henry is a volatile swordsman who wields a special blade that stores energy to boost its attacks. He has no cooldowns, but must manage his energy well.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Sword Mode is used to build up energy while Gun Mode is used to spend energy for powerful attacks.

< ! > Swordmaster can be charged up for more damage.

< ! > Flash Step is a powerful aggressive tool that helps to build up energy.

< ! > Use Hydra Bite to stay healthy and Hyper Beam to unleash a ton of damage.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..he tried so hard, and got so far. But in the end it doesn't even matter.
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_SECONDARY_CLONETHROW_DE: Покличте клона й киньте його вперед, хапаючи близьких ворогів і б’ючи їх об землю на <style=cIsDamage>420% шкоди</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Henry wields a special weapon that can swap between Sword Mode and Gun Mode. Also, his skills don't have regular cooldowns, but instead rely on his sword's <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> system.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_UTILITY_ROLL_DESCRIPTION: Перекотіться на коротку відстань, отримуючи <style=cIsUtility>300 броні</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Під час перекату вас не можуть вдарити.</style>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_GUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>2.5% Energy.</style> Fire a piercing <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> shot for <style=cIsDamage>240% damage</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPFRENZY_DESCRI:
Charge up <style=cIsHealth>Fury</style> on hit. Use when fully charged to enter a <style=cIsDamage>frenzy</style> for <style=cIsUtility>10 seconds</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Charges faster at lower здоров'я.</style>
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Stat bonuses massively increased. Duration increased.</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HENRY_BODY_MASTERYUNLOCK: Переможіть або облітеруйтесь за Henry на Monsoon.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SPECIAL_BEAM_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>100% Energy.</style> Charge up a powerful barrage of lasers that deals <style=cIsDamage>10x540% damage</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_SCEPBOMB_DESCRIPT:
Киньте бомбу на <style=cIsDamage>1600% шкоди</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: тримайте до 4 бомб. Перезарядка вдвічі менша.</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVE: As Nemesis Henry, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_PRIMARY_BAZOOKA_DESCRIPTI: Зарядіть і випустіть ракету на <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% шкоди</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_DANTEUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEME: As Henry, defeat a Twisted Scavenger on Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_ROB_HENRY_BODY_TYPHOONUNLOCK:
Переможіть або облітеруйтесь за Henry на Typhoon або Eclipse.
<color=#8888>(Зараховується будь-яка складність Typhoon або вище)</color>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SWORDCSS_DESCRIPT:
Swing your blade forward for <style=cIsDamage>280% damage</style>. Generate <style=cIsHealing>20% Energy</style> on hit.
<style=cIsHealing>2.5% Energy.</style> Fire a piercing <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> shot for <style=cIsDamage>240% damage</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SPEAR_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agile.</style> Stab forward for <style=cIsDamage>160% damage</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Deals double damage and heals for <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> of damage dealt at the tip</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..і так він пішов, шукаючи нову ідентичність.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_PRIMARY_GUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Спритний.</style> Стріляйте з малого пістолета, завдаючи <style=cIsDamage>90% шкоди</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_FRENZY_DESCRIPTIO: Накопичуйте <style=cIsHealth>Fury</style> під час влучань. При повному заряді увійдіть у <style=cIsDamage>лють</style> на <style=cIsUtility>10 секунд</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Заряджається швидше при низькому здоровʼї.</style>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SPECIAL_STABCSS_DESCRIPTI:
<style=cIsHealing>100% Energy.</style> Plunge your blade into an enemy for <style=cIsDamage>2800% damage</style>, inflicting a potent debuff. <style=cIsHealing>Heal for 50% of damage dealt.</style>
<style=cIsHealing>100% Energy.</style> Charge up a powerful beam that deals <style=cIsDamage>a lot of damage</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_BURST_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>10% Energy.</style> Discharge a burst of <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> for <style=cIsDamage>400% damage</style>, <style=cIsUtility>launching yourself with the recoil</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_DESCRIPTION: Генрі — вправний боєць, який використовує широкий арсенал зброї для знищення ворогів.<color=#CCD3E0>
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_BLAST_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsUtility>Agile.</style> Throw a blob of <style=cIsHealth>mysterious energy</style> for <style=cIsDamage>200% damage</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SPECIAL_STAB_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>100% Energy.</style> Plunge your blade into an enemy for <style=cIsDamage>2800% damage</style>, inflicting a potent debuff. <style=cIsHealing>Heal for 50% of damage dealt.</style>
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_SPECIAL_BAZOOKA_DESCRIPTI: Зарядіть і випустіть ракети на <style=cIsDamage>600%-1600% шкоди</style>.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_CHARGE_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsHealing>10% Energy.</style> Lunge at a nearby enemy for <style=cIsDamage>700% damage</style>. Perform a combo attack instead if within melee range.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..і так він зник, назавжди чистий аркуш.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_VERGILUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEM: As Henry, defeat the King of Nothing with no items.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_SECONDARY_CHARGECSS_DESCR:
<style=cIsHealing>10% Energy.</style> Lunge at a nearby enemy for <style=cIsDamage>700% damage</style>. Perform a combo attack instead if within melee range.
<style=cIsHealing>5% Energy.</style> Fire a barrage of <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> shots. Hold to continue firing, consuming more <style=cIsHealing>Energy</style> per shot.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_UTILITY_BLINK_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealing>5% Energy.</style> <style=cIsUtility>Instantly blink</style> to a nearby enemy.
strings.ROB_NEMRY_BODY_PRIMARY_SWORD_DESCRIPTION: Swing your blade forward for <style=cIsDamage>280% damage</style>. Generate <style=cIsHealing>20% Energy</style> on hit.
strings.ROB_MRGREEN_BODY_PRIMARY_PUNCH_DESCRIPTI: Виконайте швидку серію ударів руками й ногами на <style=cIsDamage>90% шкоди</style>.
strings.ROB_HENRY_BODY_PRIMARY_PUNCH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Спритний.</style> Швидко бийте кулаками, завдаючи <style=cIsDamage>240% шкоди</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ігнорує броню.</style>
